author.bio: tech leading @libp2p & @run_testground at @protocollabs | engineer: fixer of some things; breaker of many | PMC @TheASF | biohacker, stoic, hiker, dogs
author.name: Raúl Kripalani

content.text:
It's been hard and rewarding to design and implement a platform to test distributed systems that actually makes testing fun.

We used @run_testground to scale the DHT and Bitswap in @IPFSbot, secure Gossipsub @libp2p, and experiment with @Filecoin.

Read https://blog.ipfs.io/2020-05-06-launching-testground/
